name: Thingz
description: IoT inventory tracker for makerspaces. Tag physical tools with BLE beacons and see live location + checkout status on a floor map.
currentGoal: Get reliable BLE presence detection working across the shop floor.
currentTask: Blocked on hardware — waiting for the second batch of BLE gateways to arrive.
nextTask: Calibrate RSSI-to-zone mapping once gateways are mounted.
recentDecisions: Went with fixed BLE gateways over phone-based scanning for reliability.
Store raw RSSI samples; compute zone server-side so we can re-tune later.
Floor map is an SVG with data-zone regions rather than a canvas.

recentCommits.message: feat: SVG floor map with zone regions

nextSessionPrompt: Currently WAITING on hardware (2nd gateway batch, ETA ~5 days). Nothing to unblock in code. When gateways arrive: mount them, then work RSSI-to-zone calibration in utils/rssi.ts using the buffered sample set.
